note: The research stage runs for Season-Strategy to sharpen the season thesis and slate. Zero external case studies fabricated; the slate is built from the owner's supplied stories and the director-of-podcast doctrine.
webResearchTool: Perplexity (wired for this client); named in the delivery report.
seasonThesis: Turn regulars into a community and generate warm leads without any episode feeling like an advertisement.
fabricationCheck: No invented study, statistic, person, company, or institution.
